item.title: Decompose _run_retry_loop() into focused sub-functions
item.intent: Break the 167-line _run_retry_loop() into 3-4 focused functions (run_preflight, run_developer_cycle, run_validation_cycle) so each does one thing and is independently testable
steps: Extract run_preflight_validation() — baseline validation before developer runs
Extract run_developer_cycle() — developer agent invocation with fix command
Extract run_validation_cycle() — scope check, validation cmd, AC verify, validator agent
Refactor _run_retry_loop to orchestrate the extracted functions
Verify sprint execution still works end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Each extracted function has a single clear responsibility
